# LandLaw (landlaw.ai)

> UK planning permission & land law, answered in seconds.

Instant AI guidance on planning permission, permitted development, boundary disputes and land law — reviewed by UK solicitors, with one-click escalation when it matters.

## What this is
LandLaw is a vertical in the CSOAI Hive — EU AI Act / NIS2 / DORA compliant tooling exposed as Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers callable by any AI agent.

## MCP tools
- landlaw-ai-mcp.check_planning: Check planning permission and permitted development rights for any UK site from an AI agent or workflow.
- landlaw-ai-mcp.draft_letter: Generate citation-backed planning and land-law letters directly from your case-management system.

## Discovery
- Agent card: https://landlaw.ai/agent.json
- MCP catalog: https://landlaw.ai/.well-known/mcp.json
- Sitemap: https://landlaw.ai/sitemap.xml
- Hive registry: https://csoai.org (271 published MCP servers)

## Pricing
See https://landlaw.ai/pricing/
